---
title: "第4章"
---

# 第4章 多元回归

<img src="img/teacher.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[讲义](https://lizongzhang.github.io/emetrics26/chap4slide.html){target="_blank"}

<img src="img/teacher.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[案例](https://lizongzhang.github.io/ee4/case1.html){target="_blank"}

#  Eviews操作

<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[Eviews 多元回归](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Zi4y1j7Xf/){target="_blank"}

<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[Eviews 受限最小二乘](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1pp4y1k7xx/){target="_blank"}
    
<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[Eviews 输出结果数值显示格式的设置](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1tZ4y1V7Rb/){target="_blank"}{target="_blank"}  

# R教学视频

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[回归模型的比较------受限模型的F检验](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1tg411a7ut){target="_blank"}


<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[统计检验/回归模型的结果解释，还在手写吗？report()自动生成](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1GaouYAEvP/){target="_blank"}

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[R如何快速创建学术论文表1 样本统计特征 tbl_summary()](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1c64y1p7as){target="_blank"}

# 习题答案

<details>
<summary style="cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold;">点击展开</summary>

<p>如果想在新窗口打开 PDF，请点这里： <a href="img/EE4_Ch04_Solutions_Manual.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">在新标签页中查看 PDF</a></p>

<iframe src="img/EE4_Ch04_Solutions_Manual.pdf" width="100%" height="800" style="border: none;" allowfullscreen>
  <!-- 备用内容（若浏览器不支持 iframe） -->
  <p>你的浏览器无法嵌入 PDF，请 <a href="img/EE4_Ch04_Solutions_Manual.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">点此下载/查看 PDF</a>.</p>
</iframe>

</details>

# 习题讲评视频

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[教材习题4.9+4.11+4.12](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1ey4y1W75g){target="_blank"}


<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[教材习题4.14+4.18+4.22](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1ey4y1W75g){target="_blank"}
